ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Input shape required by the model */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Output shape produced by the model */,
  "resource_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum resource requirements (e.g., memory, CPU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpu_resources" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU resource */,
  "gpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU resource */,
  "total_gpu_memory" REAL /* Total memory available on the GPU in GB */,
  "available_gpu_memory" REAL /* Available memory on the GPU in GB */,
  "gpu_description" TEXT /* Description of the GPU resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GPU resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GPU resource was last updated */,
  "gpu_type" TEXT /* Type of GPU (e.g., training, inference) */,
  "gpu_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the GPU */,
  "gpu_core_count" INTEGER /* Number of cores in the GPU */,
  "gpu_clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the GPU */,
  "gpu_power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the GPU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tested */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU resource used for testing */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during testing */,
  "total_latency" REAL /* Total latency in milliseconds */,
  "real_exec_times" INTEGER /* Number of real execution times */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency in milliseconds */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the performance test */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Number of samples processed per second */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption during the test */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the GPU during the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpu_resources ("gpu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, DevOps engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
